description: osgi.annotation is the OSGi Release 8 aggregate annotation artifact used when compiling OSGi bundles. It packages bundle and versioning annotations for declaring manifest headers, requirements, capabilities, exports, package versions, and provider or consumer API roles in source code.

osgi.annotation is the OSGi Release 7 aggregate annotation artifact used when compiling OSGi bundles. It packages bundle and versioning annotations for declaring manifest headers, requirements, capabilities, exports, package versions, and provider or consumer API roles in source code.
